description: List the 17 known Hugging Science topic slugs (offline — no network).
rules: no network — slugs are a hard-coded list in fetch_catalog.py
usage: No vars. Output: topics.txt (one slug per line plus the live-list hint).
limitation: Slugs are best-effort/static; if a slug 404s later, use the `raw` perk to refetch llms.txt for the live list.
